item.title: Agentic AI Is Forcing Contracts To Govern Continuous Behavior
item.description: Agentic AI isn’t about independent intent. It’s about continuity.

item.title: Northrop Not Seeking Direct Government Investment for Solid Rocket Motors, But Suppliers Might: CEO
item.description: “There's just a lot of strategic synergy in those parts of our portfolio that we want to maintain ownership structure of,” said Northrop CEO Kathy War...

item.title: Could Artificial Intelligence Bankrupt Social Security?
item.description: The solvency of the social security trust fund has been a concern in the past few decades.

item.title: Stock Traders Are No Longer Taking Employment And Inflation Data From The Trump Administration At Face Value

item.description: Former Prince Andrew faces another side of the Jeffrey Epstein experience; how about a Fed rate hike, Don?: JPMorgan to finance Gaza rebuilding, maybe...
